CREATE TABLE test_pow (x Float64, y Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT pow(0, 0) AS zero_power_zero, pow(1, 1) AS one_power_one, pow(-1, 2) AS negative_one_power_two;
WITH (SELECT AVG(y) FROM test_pow) AS avg_y SELECT pow(x, avg_y) FROM test_pow;
CREATE TABLE test_data (a Float64, b Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT a, b, pow(a, b) AS result FROM test_data WHERE b > 0;
SELECT a, b, pow(a, b) AS result, pow(b, a) AS reverse_result FROM test_data;
SELECT pow(x, (SELECT MAX(y) FROM test_pow)) AS max_power FROM test_pow;
SELECT a, b, pow(a, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data)) AS powered_count FROM test_data;
WITH (SELECT SUM(pow(x, 2)) FROM test_pow) AS sum_pow_x SELECT pow(sum_pow_x, 0.5) AS sqrt_sum_power FROM test_pow;
SELECT SUM(pow(x, y)) FROM test_pow WHERE y IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE complex_query (c Float64, d Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT pow(c, 2) + pow(d, 2) AS sum_of_squares FROM complex_query;
SELECT pow(c, (SELECT AVG(d) FROM complex_query)) AS weighted_pow FROM complex_query;
